subject: {rival} wants {player}
body:
Word around the league is that {rival} wants to sign {player}. Their manager is apparently a big admirer.

This could be serious — we may receive a formal offer soon.

es.subject: {rival} quiere a {player}
es.body:
Se rumorea en la liga que {rival} quiere fichar a {player}. Su entrenador es, aparentemente, un gran admirador.

Esto podría ser serio — puede que recibamos una oferta formal pronto.
